Florian Wirtz’s Liverpool Form Defended by Germany Boss

Nov 11, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Florian Wirtz’s Liverpool Form Defended by Germany Boss

Despite a high-profile move to Liverpool F.C., German attacking midfielder Florian Wirtz has failed to register a goal or assist in his first set of Premier League appearances. Germany manager Julian Nagelsmann came to his defence, noting that the lack of end product is partly down to the wider team’s struggles and Wirtz’s adjustment period.
